postReview.title: Spain 3-3 Netherlands (5-5 agg, 5-4 pens): Nations League holders survive rollercoaster tie
postReview.description: Pedri scored the decisive penalty as Spain dumped the Netherlands out of the Nations League in a shoot-out, after another absorbing draw.

preReview.title: Yamal not ready for Messi comparisons, claims De Jong
preReview.description: Frenkie de Jong claims his Barcelona team-mate Lamine Yamal is "still not good enough" to be compared to Lionel Messi.

QAData.question: Who won between Spain and Netherlands on Sun, 23 Mar 2025 19:45:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Spain won 3–3 (5–4) over Netherlands after penalties on Sun, 23 Mar 2025 19:45:00 GMT.
